data.body:
PASS 1 review — rubric T10 (Infrastructure / IaC, overlay):

NOT-APPLICABLE / PASS — no findings. T10 is an overlay that applies only when a plan provisions or configures infrastructure (cloud resources; IaC via Terraform/CloudFormation/CDK/Pulumi/Ansible; Kubernetes/Helm). This ticket is a reducer-IGNORED REVIEW_RESULT event recorded into rebar's EXISTING event log — a software/data-layer observability substrate. No infra is provisioned or configured:

- STATE/PLAN-APPLY, IAM, SECRETS, ENV-ISOLATION, COST/SIZING, OBSERVABILITY-AS-INFRA: none apply — there is no remote state, no cloud roles/policies, no provisioned resources, no secrets-in-IaC surface.
- RETENTION/CLEANUP (Scope, T9/T5b) is implemented by REUSING "rebar's existing event compaction" — in-repo software behavior over the append-only event log, not infrastructure provisioning. (The COST captured in the new latency/cost AC is per-pass review cost recorded as sidecar metadata, not cloud-resource cost/sizing.)
- ROLLOUT / cross-clone coexistence AC concerns event-format/binary forward-compat (preserve-and-ignore by older clones, fsck WARN on newer event types, readers-before-writers) — not Helm/IaC env-isolation or blast-radius.

Per the overlay's ANTI-FP clause (not-applicable for non-infra tickets), T10 does not fire.

Affirmations (T10): not-applicable for this non-infra, event-log software ticket — no findings.
